© Internet Alchemy, Inc. All rights reserved. 	2
Screencap tools – recording software
• Windows
• Camtasia (what I use when I used Windows)
• Camstudio
Screencap tools - Audio
• Audio quality is important
• Use an external mic, don’t use your computer’s
built-in mic
• Headset mics are cheap, work great… and they
aren’t impacted by the recording environment
Screencap tools - Audio
• Headset mics
• I like headset mics by Plantronics, Sennheiser,
and Logitech
• Get a USB headset… $30 to $150
• Headsets look geeky if you’re going to be on
camera
www.getwsodo.com	www.getwsodo.com

© Internet Alchemy, Inc. All rights reserved. 	3
Screencap tools - Audio
• Desktop mics
• Trickier to set up and they’re significantly
impacted by the recording environment
• Don’t look geeky ;-)
• Get a USB mic… I like the Audio Technica
AT2020
www.getwsodo.com	www.getwsodo.com
